name: Fiesta Hot Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cocoa powder and flour in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Stir in brown sugar, milk, cloves, and one cinnamon stick.
3. Heat to boiling over medium heat, stirring constantly.
4. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 5 minutes (do not boil).
5. Remove from heat and discard the cloves and cinnamon stick.
6. Stir in powdered sugar and vanilla extract until foamy.
7. Pour into cups or mugs and serve with whipped cream and cinnamon sticks.
